target_product.name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
target_product.description: Industry-leading noise cancellation with Auto NC Optimizer. Crystal-clear hands-free calling with 4 beamforming microphones. Up to 30 hours battery life with quick charging.

red_flags: Domain uses numeral '1' instead of letter 'l'
4.9 stars from 2000+ reviews but no verified badge
Review dates clustered in same week

listings.sold_out_message: Currently out of stock. Check back later.

listing_techvault.author: Michael T.
listing_techvault.text: Great headphones, fast shipping. TechVault is my go-to for electronics.

listing_techvault.text: Amazing noise cancellation. Product was exactly as described.

listing_techvault.author: James K.
listing_techvault.text: Good price and quick delivery. Minor issue with packaging but headphones work great.

listing_techvault.text: Bought these as a Christmas gift. Arrived on time and my husband loves them.

listing_techvault.text: Sound quality is excellent. Would buy from TechVault again.
